posts.author: brittanywildridge (Brittany)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Why on EARTH are there no postal codes when I enter an address in a location column? When I start typing it will automatically fill out the street, city and province (and add Canada on the end) but doesn’t incorporate the postal code? I am trying to use our Monday.com client lists for Christmas cards and am now forced to google hundreds of postal codes, one by one…

What are you trying to achieve

Why on EARTH are there no postal codes when I enter an address in a location column? When I start typing it will automatically fill out the street, city and province (and add Canada on the end) but doesn’t incorporate the postal code? I am trying to use our Monday.com client lists for Christmas cards and am now forced to google hundreds of postal codes, one by one…
